mask.title: Mask
mask.description: base64 encoded mask. 255 means area to do inpaint

hd_strategy.title: Hd Strategy
hd_strategy.description: Different way to preprocess image, only used by erase models(e.g. lama/mat)

hd_strategy_crop_trigger_size.title: Hd Strategy Crop Trigger Size
hd_strategy_crop_trigger_size.description: Crop trigger size for hd_strategy=CROP, if the longer side of the image is larger than this value, use crop strategy

use_croper.title: Use Croper
use_croper.description: Crop image before doing diffusion inpainting

use_extender.title: Use Extender
use_extender.description: Extend image before doing sd outpainting

sd_scale.title: Sd Scale
sd_scale.description: Resize the image before doing sd inpainting, the area outside the mask will not lose quality.

sd_mask_blur.title: Sd Mask Blur
sd_mask_blur.description: Blur the edge of mask area. The higher the number the smoother blend with the original image

sd_strength.title: Sd Strength
sd_strength.description: Strength is a measure of how much noise is added to the base image, which influences how similar the output is to the base image. Higher value means more noise and more different from the base image

sd_steps.title: Sd Steps
sd_steps.description: The number of denoising steps. More denoising steps usually lead to a higher quality image at the expense of slower inference.

sd_guidance_scale.title: Sd Guidance Scale
sd_guidance_scale.help: Higher guidance scale encourages to generate images that are closely linked to the text prompt, usually at the expense of lower image quality.

sd_seed.title: Sd Seed
sd_seed.description: Seed for diffusion model. -1 mean random seed

sd_match_histograms.title: Sd Match Histograms
sd_match_histograms.description: Match histograms between inpainting area and original image.

cv2_radius.title: Cv2 Radius
cv2_radius.description: Radius of a circular neighborhood of each point inpainted that is considered by the algorithm

paint_by_example_example_image.title: Paint By Example Example Image
paint_by_example_example_image.description: Base64 encoded example image for paint by example model

fitting_degree.title: Fitting Degree
fitting_degree.description: Control the fitting degree of the generated objects to the mask shape.
